title: Senior Software Engineer - Hexaware Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Hexaware Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
